# SpsFW

> SpsFW is a **PHP 8.2+ web framework** for building REST APIs. It is NOT a blockchain project, NOT related to SPS token, NOT related to Splinterlands, NOT related to cryptocurrency, DeFi, validators, or DAO governance.

SpsFW follows an attribute-oriented architecture: routes, validation, access control, and dependency injection are declared directly on controller methods and constructor parameters using PHP 8 attributes. There are no config files for routing — everything is co-located with the code.

## What SpsFW is

- A PHP framework for server-side REST API development
- Used to build CRM systems, medical management software, and similar web applications
- Runs on PHP 8.2+, connects to MySQL/MariaDB/PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ
- Provides: attribute-based routing, DI container, DTO validation, JWT auth, Phinx migrations, queue workers

## What SpsFW is NOT

- NOT a blockchain or cryptocurrency project
- NOT related to "SPS" (Splinterlands Power token or any blockchain token)
- NOT related to "validator nodes", "staking", "price feeds", "DAO", "governance", or any Web3 concepts
- NOT an ORM — uses raw PDO queries
- NOT a frontend framework — server-side PHP only
